ActionCategories.Title: Server Information
ActionCategories.Description: View information about the Azure server hosting this backend.

Actions.Name: Server OS Info
Actions.Description: Shows operating system details of the Azure server
Actions.Script: $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; Write-Output "Computer: $env:COMPUTERNAME"; Write-Output "OS: $($os.Caption)"; Write-Output "Version: $($os.Version)"; Write-Output "Architecture: $($os.OSArchitecture)"; Write-Output "Install Date: $($os.InstallDate)"; Write-Output "Last Boot: $($os.LastBootUpTime)"

Actions.Name: Server Resources
Actions.Description: Shows CPU, memory, and disk usage of the Azure server
Actions.Script: $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $totalRAM = [math]::Round($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize / 1MB, 2); $freeRAM = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory / 1MB, 2); $usedRAM = $totalRAM - $freeRAM; $pctRAM = [math]::Round(($usedRAM / $totalRAM) * 100, 1); Write-Output "=== Memory ==="; Write-Output "Total: ${totalRAM} GB"; Write-Output "Used: ${usedRAM} GB (${pctRAM}%)"; Write-Output "Free: ${freeRAM} GB"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Disk ==="; Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Where-Object { $_.Used -ne $null } | ForEach-Object { $total = [math]::Round(($_.Used + $_.Free) / 1GB, 1); $free = [math]::Round($_.Free / 1GB, 1); Write-Output "Drive $($_.Name): ${free}GB free of ${total}GB" }

ActionCategories.Title: Connectivity Tests
ActionCategories.Description: Test network connectivity from the Azure server.

Actions.Name: Ping Test
Actions.Script: $targets = @('8.8.8.8','1.1.1.1','google.com','microsoft.com'); $results = @(); foreach ($t in $targets) { $ping = Test-Connection $t -Count 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($ping) { $avg = [math]::Round(($ping | Measure-Object ResponseTime -Average).Average, 1); $results += "$t : ${avg}ms" } else { $results += "$t : UNREACHABLE" } }; Write-Output ($results -join [Environment]::NewLine)

Actions.Name: DNS Lookup Test
Actions.Description: Tests DNS resolution for common domains
Actions.Script: $domains = @('google.com','microsoft.com','github.com','cloudflare.com'); $results = @(); foreach ($d in $domains) { try { $ip = [System.Net.Dns]::GetHostAddresses($d) | Select-Object -First 1; $results += "$d -> $($ip.IPAddressToString)" } catch { $results += "$d -> FAILED" } }; Write-Output ($results -join [Environment]::NewLine)

Actions.Name: Download Speed Test
Actions.Description: Tests download speed from the Azure server
Actions.Script: try { $url = 'https://speed.cloudflare.com/__down?bytes=5000000'; $start = Get-Date; $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $data = $wc.DownloadData($url); $elapsed = ((Get-Date) - $start).TotalSeconds; $sizeMB = $data.Length / 1MB; $speedMbps = [math]::Round(($sizeMB * 8) / $elapsed, 2); Write-Output "Downloaded: $([math]::Round($sizeMB,2)) MB"; Write-Output "Time: $([math]::Round($elapsed,2)) seconds"; Write-Output "Speed: $speedMbps Mbps" } catch { Write-Output "Speed test failed: $($_.Exception.Message)" }

ActionCategories.Title: Demo Actions
ActionCategories.Description: Demonstration actions to test the system is working.

Actions.Name: Hello World
Actions.Description: Simple test to verify PowerShell execution works
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Hello from Azure App Service!'; Write-Output "Current time: $(Get-Date)"; Write-Output "PowerShell version: $($PSVersionTable.PSVersion)"
